zotero.abstractNote: We propose a framework to learn a Lyapunov function and a stabilizing controller for a nonlinear dynamical system. Our approach, called Neural Lyapunov Redesign (NLR), uses a neural network to parameterize the Lyapunov function and another to parameterize the controller. We use the Lyapunov redesign method to derive a control law that guarantees stability of the closed-loop system. We show that our method can be used to stabilize a wide range of nonlinear systems, including those with unknown dynamics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on several benchmark control problems.

extra.Editors: Jadbabaie, Ali and Lygeros, John and Pappas, George J. and Parrilo, Pablo A. and Recht, Benjamin and Tomlin, Claire J. and Zeilinger, Melanie N.
